description_long: This object is a classic vinyl record, circular in shape with a glossy black surface and a central light blue label. The record features concentric grooves that spiral from the outer edge toward the center, characteristic of analog audio storage. The surface is highly reflective, with visible highlights and subtle textural lines indicating the grooves. The edge is thin and sharply defined, giving the record a sleek, delicate appearance. The central label is flat and matte, contrasting with the shiny black vinyl. No additional components such as a tonearm, stylus, or control knobs are present, indicating this is just the record and not a full record player.
description: A glossy black vinyl record with a light blue central label and visible concentric grooves. The object is thin, circular, and highly reflective.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full circular record, black grooves, and a light blue central label.
description_view_1: Edge-on view revealing the record's extreme thinness and sharp profile.
description_view_2: Another top-down view identical to view 0, displaying the record's face and label.
description_view_3: Edge-on view identical to view 1, emphasizing the slimness of the record.
